description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-slot toaster with a sleek metallic finish and a textured black front panel. The top features two wide, parallel slots for bread, each with visible internal heating elements and guides. The front face displays a set of control buttons and a lever, along with a rotary dial for adjusting browning levels, all arranged vertically beside a small brand logo. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design. The toaster's overall appearance is robust, with a combination of matte and glossy surfaces, and it is likely constructed from metal and plastic. The base is flat, providing stability for placement on countertops or tables.
description: A sleek, metallic two-slot toaster with a textured black front, control buttons, and a rotary dial for browning adjustment. The design is modern and robust, with a mix of matte and glossy finishes.
description_view_0: The front view shows the textured black panel, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the smooth, metallic surface with no controls or features visible.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing the textured black panel without controls or branding.
description_view_3: The main control panel view displays the lever, rotary dial, three buttons, and a visible brand logo on the metallic surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, circular logo with the text 'VETIC' is visible on the lower right of the front control panel.
attribute_control_knobs: One round, metallic rotary dial with labeled settings is located on the lower left of the front panel.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots are positioned parallel on the top, each with visible internal guides and heating elements.
